nasb.text: There was a small city with few men in it and a great king came to it, surrounded it and constructed large siegeworks against it.

esv.text: There was a little city with few men in it, and a great king came against it and besieged it, building great siegeworks against it.

cnv.text: 有一座小城，人數不多；有一個大君王來進攻，把它包圍，建造巨大的高壘攻城。

ccb.text: 有一个势力强大的君王来攻击一个人口不多的小城，他建造营垒围困这城。

csbs.text: 有一座小城，城中的人很少；一个大君王来到，把它包围，并建造巨大的高垒来攻城。
